rulings.Case Title: GARY STRENG VS. KEYNOTE PROPERTIES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Permitting Discovery Of Financial Condition Of Def Robert Camozzi
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 12, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFF GARY STRENG's Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Financial Condition Of Defendant Robert Camozzi Continued to March 17, 2014. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of opposition to department 501 no later than 4 p.m. March 11, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE E. SANTOS COLORADO VS. THE BANK OF MELLON NEW YORK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Dismiss The Complaint By Deft The Bank Of New York Mellon, As Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 12, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON's Motion To Dismiss The Complaint By Defendant The Bank Of New York Mellon GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID KARNER et al VS. ROY SHIMEK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 12, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANTs ROY SHIMEK, PATRICIA SHIMEK, SHIMEK PROPERTIES LLC and CANADIAN-AMERICAN OIL COMPANY's Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint DENIED. Defendants knew of the facts giving rise to cross-complaint since April 15, 2013. Trial was originally set for March 10, 2014 and currently set for June 16, 2014. Defendants may file this non-compulsory cross-complaint as a separate action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA T LOPEZ et al VS. U.S. BANK , N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR THE SARM 2006-8 et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltffs' Unverified Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 12, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS, LLC's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' Unverified Complaint Moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA T LOPEZ et al VS. U.S. BANK , N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR THE SARM 2006-8 et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 12, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained. Demurer to causes of action 1-5 is sustained without leave to amend. Jenkins v. JP Morgan Chase Bank, N.A., (2013) 216 Cal. App. 4th 497; Apostol v. CitiMortgage, Inc. (N.D. Cal., Nov. 21, 2013), 13-CV-01983-WHO). Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 6-7 causes of action to allege in good faith facts in support of each element of these causes of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORTH EAST MEDICAL SERVICES VS. LAW OFFICES OF ANSEL D. KINNEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing For Their Mtn For New Trial
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 12, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT ANSEL KINNEY and THOMAS LALANNE's Hearing For Their Motion For New Trial DENIED. Defendants failed to provide evidence or authority to support all elements of affirmative defense of estoppel, even if the Court were to consider Defendant's written opposition. Additionally, newly discovered evidence was not listed as grounds for Defendant's Motion for new trial. No valid proof of service re: discovery. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SIMPLEX INVESTMENT FUND I, LLC VS. LIDER E MOREIRA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 12, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT LIDER MOREIRA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that "portion of the premises" alleged to be sublet has to be described with particularity in the operative notice. Written agreement regarding the premises is attached to the complaint. Whether any modifications were in writing is an issue of fact. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NANCY WILLIAMS VS. ARLENE BROOKS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 12, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANT ALENE YOUNG's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)
